case_title: MATT CARLIN VS. GEORGE E SMITH et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARLIN, MATT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, GEORGE E THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 286 VALENCIA STREET, #18, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, GEORGE E
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, GEORGE E
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARLIN, MATT AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, GEORGE E DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION RE: RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARLIN, MATT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $46.03 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARLIN, MATT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, GEORGE E

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT BLANK PRE JUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARLIN, MATT SERVED OCT-20-2011, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
